3 distinct agent roles confirmed
Screen Author, State and Data Model Author, Validation and Integration Author defined with specific outputs

5 boundary examples confirmed
Example 1: Optional Screens (Conditional Presence), Example 2: Undo/Redo Flow, Example 3: Permission-Gated UI, Example 4: Real-Time Screens (Live Updates), Example 5: Multi-Step Transaction

assertions.title: Readability and Clarity for Non-Expert Agents

summary: Tested 8 VAL-AGENTS assertions: 8 passed (VAL-AGENTS-001 through VAL-AGENTS-008). AGENTS.md provides comprehensive AI guidance with: 2 prompt templates, 10 error catalog entries, 5 boundary examples, 3 agent roles, linter integration with CI snippets, and consistent implementation-independent terminology.
